NAME: Old Gregor
DESC: A weathered man in faded robes who seems to know more than he lets on.

NAME: Sister Mara
DESC: A calm woman in white robes, her hands glowing faintly with restorative energy.

NAME: Hargrim the Smith
DESC: A broad-shouldered dwarf hammering at a glowing blade. Sparks fly with each strike.

NAME: Zara the Peddler
DESC: A quick-eyed woman with a cart overflowing with trinkets and oddities.

NAME: Finn the Bookkeeper
DESC: A thin man with spectacles perched on his nose, surrounded by ledgers.

NAME: Straw Dummy
DESC: A crude training dummy stuffed with straw. It doesn't fight back much.

NAME: Tower Rat
DESC: A large grey rat with beady red eyes. It hisses at your approach.

NAME: Cave Spider
DESC: A palm-sized spider with venomous-looking fangs.

NAME: Feral Hound
DESC: A scarred dog gone wild. It bares its teeth and circles you.

NAME: Skeleton Sentry
DESC: A reanimated skeleton clutching a rusted sword. It moves with jerky purpose.

NAME: Goblin Archer
DESC: A small green creature perched on a ledge, bow drawn.

NAME: Tower Guardian
DESC: A stone golem animated by faint magic. It blocks the stairs upward.

NAME: Wind Wraith
DESC: A translucent figure made of swirling air. It moans softly.

NAME: Animated Tome
DESC: A thick book that floats in the air, its pages fluttering with malice.

NAME: Blood Slime
DESC: A quivering mass of crimson ooze that absorbs everything it touches.

NAME: Tower Champion
DESC: A battle-scarred warrior in dented plate armor. The final test.

NAME: Instructor Kael
DESC: A grizzled warrior with scars across both arms. He watches newcomers with a knowing eye.
DIALOGUE: You've done well to reach the summit. The real challenges lie beyond the gateways.

NAME: Quartermaster Pip
DESC: A small, energetic gnome-like figure with oversized spectacles and ink-stained fingers.
DIALOGUE: Welcome to the Quest Shop! Everything here costs Quest Points.

NAME: Barkeep Roderick
DESC: A burly man polishing a mug behind a stained oak counter. The inn smells of ale and woodsmoke.

NAME: Elara the Alchemist
DESC: A young woman surrounded by bubbling flasks and dried herbs. Her eyes are slightly different colors.

NAME: Market Crier
DESC: A loud man in a colorful vest, shouting about daily deals to anyone who will listen.

NAME: Priestess Solara
DESC: A serene woman in golden robes, standing before a sunlit altar. Light seems to bend toward her.

NAME: One-Eyed Jack
DESC: A scarred man nursing a drink in the corner. His one good eye misses nothing.

NAME: Gate Sergeant Brynn
DESC: A stern woman in dented plate armor, watching the road with practiced vigilance.

NAME: Chamberlain Aldous
DESC: A thin man in fine but dusty clothes, wringing his hands nervously.

NAME: Master-at-Arms Voss
DESC: A grizzled veteran surrounded by racks of weapons. Every blade is perfectly maintained.

NAME: Sage Meridian
DESC: An elderly figure hunched over ancient texts, muttering to themselves.

NAME: Bandit Footpad
DESC: A scrawny thief with a rusty dagger and desperate eyes.

NAME: Forest Wolf
DESC: A grey wolf with yellow eyes. It circles warily.

NAME: Skeleton Warrior
DESC: Bones held together by dark magic. It raises a notched sword.

NAME: Goblin Scout
DESC: A green-skinned creature with a crude spear and a nasty grin.

NAME: Dark Acolyte
DESC: A hooded figure muttering forbidden incantations.

NAME: Iron Golem
DESC: A massive construct of rusted iron. Its eyes glow red.

NAME: Shadow Knight
DESC: A warrior in black plate armor. Darkness seeps from the joints.

NAME: Dragon Whelp
DESC: A young dragon the size of a horse. Smoke curls from its nostrils.

NAME: Field Mouse
DESC: A tiny brown mouse that scurries between the cobblestones. Harmless but annoying.

NAME: Stray Cat
DESC: A mangy tabby cat with one torn ear. It hisses at your approach.

NAME: Feral Boar
DESC: A bristle-backed boar with yellowed tusks. It paws the ground aggressively.

NAME: Bandit Archer
DESC: A rangy woman with a shortbow and a quiver of black-fletched arrows.

NAME: Bandit Captain
DESC: A scarred man in mismatched armor barking orders at his crew.

NAME: Goblin Shaman
DESC: A hunched goblin rattling a bone staff and chanting in a guttural tongue.

NAME: Goblin Brute
DESC: A massive goblin nearly the size of an orc. It drags a spiked club.

NAME: Dire Wolf
DESC: A wolf twice the normal size with frost on its muzzle and murder in its eyes.

NAME: Timber Rattlesnake
DESC: A thick-bodied snake coiled in the underbrush. Its rattle buzzes a warning.

NAME: Giant Spider
DESC: A spider the size of a dog with venom dripping from its fangs.

NAME: Skeleton Archer
DESC: A skeleton with a cracked longbow. It draws back a bone-tipped arrow.

NAME: Skeleton Mage
DESC: A robed skeleton clutching a staff that crackles with necrotic energy.

NAME: Restless Spirit
DESC: A translucent figure drifting through the ruins. Its wail chills the blood.

NAME: Cursed Knight
DESC: A knight in tarnished armor. The visor is rusted shut but something moves inside.

NAME: Troll
DESC: A hulking green-skinned brute that regenerates wounds before your eyes.

NAME: Ogre
DESC: A dim-witted giant in a loincloth swinging a tree trunk as a weapon.

NAME: Harpy
DESC: A shrieking bird-woman with talons like daggers. She dives from above.

NAME: Minotaur
DESC: A bull-headed warrior in bronze armor. The labyrinth is his domain.

NAME: Wraith Lord
DESC: An ancient spirit of terrible power. The air freezes in its presence.

NAME: Lich Apprentice
DESC: A skeletal mage surrounded by floating spell-tomes and crackling runes.

NAME: Stone Gargoyle
DESC: A statue that wasn't a statue. Its stone wings crack open as it lunges.

NAME: Wandering Merchant
DESC: A jovial halfling with an overloaded pack mule and a winning smile.
DIALOGUE: Welcome friend! Care to browse my wares?

NAME: Old Hermit
DESC: A weathered man in patched robes leaning on a gnarled staff.
DIALOGUE: The forest remembers what men forget.

NAME: Crown Militia Guard
DESC: A soldier in the livery of the Shattered Crown. Alert but not hostile.
DIALOGUE: Move along citizen.

NAME: Scarred Veteran Grimjaw
DESC: A hulking figure covered in old battle scars, chained to the wall by choice rather than force. An enormous axe rests against the stone beside them. Their eyes burn with barely contained fury.
DIALOGUE: Defense is for cowards. Swing harder. Swing ANGRIER.

NAME: Plague Rat
DESC: A bloated rat with patchy fur and weeping sores. Disease incarnate.

NAME: Carrion Crow
DESC: A fat black bird pecking at something best not examined.

NAME: Moss Golem
DESC: A shambling mass of earth and moss. Mushrooms sprout from its shoulders.

NAME: Barrow Wight
DESC: A desiccated corpse in ancient finery. Gold coins spill from its eye sockets.

NAME: Forest Troll
DESC: A smaller troll covered in bark and lichen. It blends with the trees.

NAME: Will-o-Wisp
DESC: A dancing ball of pale light that leads travelers astray.

NAME: Owlbear
DESC: A terrifying hybrid of owl and bear. It hoots and roars simultaneously.

NAME: Prisoner Giles
DESC: A haggard man chained to the wall, barely conscious but still aware.

NAME: Ghost of Forgemaster Durin
DESC: A translucent dwarf standing before the cold forge, forever reaching for his hammer.

NAME: Aldric the Distraught Wizard
DESC: A tall, thin man in singed robes paces the ruins of his tower. His hair stands at wild angles, and his eyes dart between the destruction around him and the sheaf of notes clutched in his trembling hands. He mutters calculations under his breath, occasionally stopping to stare at the holes in his walls with a mixture of terror and academic fascination.

NAME: Street Punk
DESC: A wired-up ganger with chrome implants and a switchblade.

NAME: Rogue Drone
DESC: A malfunctioning delivery drone sparking with exposed wires.

NAME: Corporate Security
DESC: A guard in black tactical gear with a stun baton.

NAME: Cyber Hound
DESC: A mechanical dog with razor teeth and infrared eyes.

NAME: Hacker Ghost
DESC: A holographic projection of a dead netrunner. Still dangerous.

NAME: Mech Enforcer
DESC: A bipedal combat mech with twin autocannons.

NAME: Synth Assassin
DESC: An android built for killing. Its face is eerily human.

NAME: Rogue AI Node
DESC: A server rack pulsing with malevolent intelligence. Drones orbit it.

NAME: Junk Rat
DESC: A rat with a circuit board fused to its spine. Its eyes glow faintly blue.

NAME: Stray Synth-Cat
DESC: A robotic cat with torn synthetic fur. It sparks when it moves.

NAME: Glitch Beetle
DESC: A swarm of tiny metallic insects that eat through wiring.

NAME: Neon Junkie
DESC: A twitching addict with a crackling stun-knuckle and nothing to lose.

NAME: Chrome Ganger
DESC: A street soldier with a chrome arm and a sawed-off shotgun.

NAME: Data Courier
DESC: A nervous runner with encrypted data-chips and a holdout pistol.

NAME: Corpo Intern
DESC: A terrified office worker who pulled a taser from their desk drawer.

NAME: Sentry Turret
DESC: A ceiling-mounted auto-turret tracking movement with a red laser.

NAME: Maintenance Bot
DESC: A utility robot gone haywire. Its welding torch swings wildly.

NAME: Netrunner Shade
DESC: The digital ghost of a flatlined hacker. It attacks through your implants.

NAME: Corporate Ninja
DESC: A black-clad operative with a monofilament blade. Corpo wetwork.

NAME: Armored Response Unit
DESC: Three corpo soldiers in heavy tactical gear moving in formation.

NAME: Cyber-Psycho
DESC: A chrome-loaded maniac who lost their humanity to too many implants.

NAME: Black ICE
DESC: Hostile intrusion countermeasure. It manifests as crackling black lightning.

NAME: Trash Compactor Bot
DESC: A massive industrial robot repurposed for violence. It crushes.

NAME: Neon District Vendor
DESC: A cheerful woman selling street food from a hovering cart.
DIALOGUE: Best synth-noodles in the Grid! Only five credits!

NAME: Info Broker
DESC: A thin man in mirrorshades who knows everyone's secrets.
DIALOGUE: Information has a price. Everything has a price.

NAME: Street Doc
DESC: A former corpo surgeon running a back-alley clinic.
DIALOGUE: I can patch you up but it won't be pretty.

NAME: Grid Patrol Officer
DESC: A tired cop in light armor doing their best in a broken system.
DIALOGUE: Keep your nose clean.

NAME: Viral Adware Sprite
DESC: A tiny holographic mascot that attacks with pop-up ads and malware.

NAME: Overclocked Courier Drone
DESC: A delivery drone hacked to kamikaze speed. It rams anything in its path.

NAME: EMP Spider
DESC: A palm-sized robot that latches on and fries electronics.

NAME: Corpo Security Chief
DESC: A scarred veteran in a custom exo-suit. She's seen everything.

NAME: Alley Mugger
DESC: A desperate man with a snub-nose revolver and shaking hands.

NAME: Corrupt Cop
DESC: A detective with dead eyes and a badge that means nothing.

NAME: Hired Muscle
DESC: A massive enforcer in a cheap suit. Knuckles like walnuts.

NAME: Cat Burglar
DESC: A lithe figure in black. You almost didn't see them.

NAME: Mob Lieutenant
DESC: A sharp-dressed man with cold eyes and a silenced pistol.

NAME: Femme Fatale
DESC: Beautiful and deadly. The knife is already in her hand.

NAME: Ghost of the Drowned
DESC: A waterlogged specter that haunts the rain-slicked docks.

NAME: The Fixer
DESC: A shadowy broker who deals in secrets and violence.

NAME: Dock Rat
DESC: A fat wharf rat the size of a terrier. It gnaws on something unidentifiable.

NAME: Feral Alley Cat
DESC: A one-eyed tom with scars and an attitude. It yowls in the dark.

NAME: Pickpocket Kid
DESC: A scrawny child with quick hands and quicker feet.

NAME: Drunk Sailor
DESC: A staggering man reeking of cheap whiskey. He swings a bottle.

NAME: Loan Shark's Thug
DESC: A thick-necked man with brass knuckles and a debt to collect.

NAME: Crooked Bookie
DESC: A sweating man with a ledger full of lies and a derringer.

NAME: Opium Den Guard
DESC: A drowsy but dangerous man with a curved knife and glazed eyes.

NAME: Smuggler
DESC: A wiry woman in a peacoat with contraband sewn into the lining.

NAME: Dock Worker Ghost
DESC: The spirit of a longshoreman crushed by falling cargo. Still working.

NAME: Speakeasy Bouncer
DESC: A mountain of a man in a too-tight vest. He cracks his knuckles.

NAME: Jazz Club Singer
DESC: A woman in a red dress with a voice like honey and eyes like razors.
DIALOGUE: Buy a girl a drink?

NAME: Private Eye
DESC: A rumpled man in a trench coat nursing a bourbon. He watches everything.
DIALOGUE: I'm working a case. Can't talk about it.

NAME: Newspaper Boy
DESC: A kid hawking papers on the corner. He knows every rumor in town.
DIALOGUE: Extra! Extra! Read all about it!

NAME: Bartender
DESC: A stone-faced man polishing a glass. He's heard every story twice.
DIALOGUE: What'll it be?

NAME: Torch Singer's Bodyguard
DESC: A silent woman with a shoulder holster and dead eyes.

NAME: Triad Enforcer
DESC: A tattooed man with a hatchet and a code of honor that doesn't include you.

NAME: Dirty Politician
DESC: A sweating man in a fine suit. He reaches for a hidden gun.

NAME: Phantom Cabbie
DESC: A ghostly taxi that runs you down in the fog. The meter's still running.

NAME: Sewer Gator
DESC: A massive albino alligator that lurks in the storm drains.

NAME: Rain Wraith
DESC: A figure made of falling rain. It dissolves and reforms endlessly.

NAME: Mob Boss's Double
DESC: A body double for someone important. Armed and expendable.

NAME: Dockside Fence
DESC: A hunched woman who buys and sells stolen goods from a boat.
DIALOGUE: I don't ask where it came from and you don't ask where it goes.

NAME: Feral Dog Pack
DESC: A pack of starving dogs with madness in their eyes.

NAME: Raider Scout
DESC: A wasteland scavenger in patchwork armor.

NAME: Militia Grunt
DESC: A poorly trained soldier with more bravery than skill.

NAME: Landmine Drone
DESC: A small crawling robot that beeps ominously.

NAME: Sniper Ghillie
DESC: A nearly invisible marksman. You only see the muzzle flash.

NAME: Tank Wraith
DESC: The ghost of a destroyed tank. Its cannon still fires.

NAME: Warlord's Champion
DESC: A scarred veteran in salvaged power armor.

NAME: Siege Mech
DESC: A towering war machine bristling with weapons.

NAME: Carrion Vulture
DESC: A huge bald bird circling overhead. It's patient.

NAME: Irradiated Coyote
DESC: A mangy coyote with glowing patches on its hide. It moves wrong.

NAME: Scrap Beetle
DESC: A metallic beetle the size of a fist that feeds on ammunition casings.

NAME: Wasteland Drifter
DESC: A gaunt figure in rags shambling through the dust. Not quite alive.

NAME: Raider Berserker
DESC: A screaming lunatic in spiked armor charging with a fire axe.

NAME: Raider Gunner
DESC: A raider with a jury-rigged machine gun mounted on a shopping cart.

NAME: Militia Sergeant
DESC: A grizzled NCO with a battered rifle and a thousand-yard stare.

NAME: Militia Medic
DESC: A field medic with a red cross armband and a combat shotgun.

NAME: Minefield Specter
DESC: The ghost of a soldier who stepped on his own mine. He warns too late.

NAME: Scorched Crawler
DESC: A burned humanoid that drags itself through the ash. It was something once.

NAME: War Dog
DESC: A trained attack dog in a kevlar vest. It responds to whistle commands.

NAME: Armored Personnel Carrier
DESC: An autonomous APC with a mounted turret. Its AI is degraded.

NAME: Flamethrower Trooper
DESC: A soldier in a heat-resistant suit with a backpack fuel tank.

NAME: Chemical Zombie
DESC: A soldier exposed to nerve agent. Still walking. Still armed.

NAME: Drone Swarm
DESC: A cloud of micro-drones that strip flesh from bone in seconds.

NAME: Artillery Ghost
DESC: The spectral crew of a destroyed howitzer. They fire phantom shells.

NAME: Field Commander
DESC: A decorated officer with a sidearm and tactical genius.

NAME: Quartermaster
DESC: A gruff supply sergeant behind a cage of military surplus.
DIALOGUE: You need it I probably got it. For a price.

NAME: Combat Medic
DESC: A weary medic with bloodstained hands and a kind voice.
DIALOGUE: Hold still. This'll sting.

NAME: War Correspondent
DESC: A civilian with a camera and more courage than sense.
DIALOGUE: The people need to see what's happening here.

NAME: Refugee
DESC: A hollow-eyed civilian clutching a bundle of possessions.
DIALOGUE: Have you seen my family?

NAME: Munitions Rat
DESC: A rat nesting in an ammo crate. It chews on primer caps.

NAME: Rust Scorpion
DESC: A scorpion the size of a cat living in a burned-out vehicle.

NAME: Void Wisp
DESC: A drifting mote of anti-light that drains warmth.

NAME: Crystal Elemental
DESC: A being of living crystal that refracts reality.

NAME: Astral Predator
DESC: A translucent creature that swims through empty space.

NAME: Echo Fragment
DESC: A piece of someone's memory given hostile form.

NAME: Gravity Anomaly
DESC: A sphere of compressed spacetime. It pulls everything inward.

NAME: Star Wraith
DESC: A being of compressed stellar energy. Blindingly bright.

NAME: Void Leviathan
DESC: A massive creature that drifts between the shards.

NAME: Reality Fracture
DESC: A tear in spacetime that lashes out at anything nearby.

NAME: Dust Mote
DESC: A tiny particle of cosmic debris that drifts aimlessly. Barely a threat.

NAME: Starlight Moth
DESC: A luminous insect with wings of condensed light. Beautiful and fragile.

NAME: Nebula Jellyfish
DESC: A translucent creature trailing bioluminescent tendrils through the void.

NAME: Comet Shard
DESC: A chunk of ice and rock hurtling through space with a mind of its own.

NAME: Phase Spider
DESC: A spider that blinks in and out of reality. Hard to hit.

NAME: Stellar Parasite
DESC: A worm-like creature that feeds on starlight and radiates cold.

NAME: Gravity Sprite
DESC: A playful entity that reverses local gravity for fun. Yours.

NAME: Void Stalker
DESC: A predator perfectly adapted to the emptiness. You see only its teeth.

NAME: Temporal Moth
DESC: A moth whose wings show scenes from other times. Its dust causes vertigo.

NAME: Crystallized Memory
DESC: A frozen moment from someone's life given solid form. It attacks with regret.

NAME: Entropy Worm
DESC: A creature that accelerates decay in everything it touches.

NAME: Cosmic Ray
DESC: A beam of pure energy that has achieved sentience and malice.

NAME: Shard Guardian
DESC: A crystalline construct tasked with protecting a floating island.

NAME: Nebula Titan
DESC: A colossal figure made of gas and dust. Stars burn in its chest.

NAME: The Cartographer
DESC: An ancient being that maps the drift. It trades in coordinates.
DIALOGUE: I have charted every shard in this sector.

NAME: Drift Hermit
DESC: A human who chose to live alone on a floating rock. Surprisingly sane.
DIALOGUE: Quiet out here. I like quiet.

NAME: Astral Merchant
DESC: A four-armed being selling exotic goods from a hovering bazaar.
DIALOGUE: Wares from a thousand realities! Browse freely!

NAME: Gladiator Slave
DESC: A desperate fighter with nothing left to lose.

NAME: Roman Legionnaire
DESC: A disciplined soldier in bronze armor with a gladius.

NAME: Egyptian Guardian
DESC: A jackal-headed warrior wielding a khopesh.

NAME: Samurai Ronin
DESC: A masterless warrior seeking death with honor.

NAME: Viking Berserker
DESC: A frothing warrior who feels no pain.

NAME: Aztec Jaguar Warrior
DESC: A fierce warrior in a jaguar pelt with an obsidian blade.

NAME: Pharaoh's Mummy
DESC: Ancient royalty wrapped in enchanted bandages.

NAME: Time Paradox
DESC: A glitching entity that exists in multiple moments simultaneously.

NAME: Cave Rat
DESC: A prehistoric rat the size of a small dog. Primitive and vicious.

NAME: Feral Pigeon
DESC: A pigeon from some era. It pecks aggressively at anything shiny.

NAME: Sand Scarab
DESC: A golden beetle the size of a fist that burrows through sand and flesh.

NAME: Gladiator Retiarius
DESC: A net-and-trident fighter with a cruel smile and quick reflexes.

NAME: Gladiator Murmillo
DESC: A heavily armored gladiator with a tower shield and short sword.

NAME: Roman Centurion
DESC: An officer in a red-crested helmet commanding with iron authority.

NAME: Egyptian Priest
DESC: A shaven-headed priest chanting protection spells over sacred ground.

NAME: Anubis Jackal
DESC: A supernatural jackal with golden eyes that guards the dead.

NAME: Ninja
DESC: A shadow-clad warrior who attacks from concealment with shuriken.

NAME: Ashigaru Spearman
DESC: A common foot soldier with a long spear and wicker armor.

NAME: Viking Shieldmaiden
DESC: A fierce woman with a round shield and a hand axe. She sings as she fights.

NAME: Viking Skald
DESC: A warrior-poet whose battle songs strengthen allies and weaken foes.

NAME: Aztec Eagle Warrior
DESC: An elite soldier in feathered armor with a macuahuitl edged in obsidian.

NAME: Terracotta Soldier
DESC: A clay warrior that animates when intruders approach. It does not tire.

NAME: Mongol Horse Archer
DESC: A mounted warrior firing arrows at a full gallop. Nearly impossible to catch.

NAME: Greek Hoplite
DESC: A bronze-armored soldier with a long spear and aspis shield.

NAME: Spartan Champion
DESC: An elite warrior who has trained since childhood for war.

NAME: Pirate Captain
DESC: A swaggering buccaneer with a cutlass and a flintlock pistol.

NAME: Clockwork Soldier
DESC: A mechanical warrior from a future that never was. Gears whir inside.

NAME: Temporal Guardian
DESC: A being tasked with protecting the timestream. You are a violation.

NAME: Chrono-Beast
DESC: A creature unstuck in time. It ages and de-ages as it fights.

NAME: Era Merchant
DESC: A time-displaced trader selling goods from every century.
DIALOGUE: Silk from the Tang Dynasty! Spices from the Age of Sail!

NAME: Temporal Scholar
DESC: A confused academic studying the frozen moments of history.
DIALOGUE: Fascinating! This epoch shouldn't exist!

NAME: Gladiator Trainer
DESC: A retired fighter covered in scars who trains the next generation.
DIALOGUE: You fight like a child. Again!

NAME: Sewer Rat Swarm
DESC: Hundreds of rats moving as one hungry mass.

NAME: Tunnel Crawler
DESC: A pale humanoid that has lived too long in the dark.

NAME: Fungal Shambler
DESC: A mass of toxic mushrooms given ambulatory form.

NAME: Pipe Wraith
DESC: A ghost trapped in the water system. It screams through the pipes.

NAME: Undercity Boss
DESC: A massive mutant who rules a section of tunnel.

NAME: The Collector
DESC: A thing that hoards everything — bones and trinkets and screams.

NAME: Sewer Roach
DESC: A cockroach the size of your hand. It skitters across the wet stone.

NAME: Drain Slug
DESC: A fat grey slug leaving a trail of corrosive slime.

NAME: Blind Fish
DESC: A pale eyeless fish that has grown legs and teeth.

NAME: Undercity Pawnbroker
DESC: A hunched figure behind a cage of rusted bars, appraising items with a jeweler's loupe.
DIALOGUE: Got something to sell? Or looking to buy? I've got... things.

NAME: Gutter Snake
DESC: A long thin snake adapted to the pipes. It drops from above.

NAME: Tunnel Spider
DESC: A pale spider with translucent skin. You can see its organs pulse.

NAME: Sewer Gator
DESC: An albino alligator that has grown enormous in the dark.

NAME: Mushroom Man
DESC: A humanoid fungus that communicates through spore clouds.

NAME: Escaped Experiment
DESC: Something that crawled out of a lab drain. It has too many limbs.

NAME: Undercity Scavenger
DESC: A human who lives in the tunnels. Territorial and desperate.

NAME: Plague Doctor
DESC: A masked figure in a long coat administering dubious cures.

NAME: Bone Collector
DESC: A hunched figure that builds sculptures from the bones of the dead.

NAME: The Drip
DESC: A sentient mass of sewage and industrial waste. It absorbs what it touches.

NAME: Tunnel Hermit
DESC: A gaunt figure wrapped in shadow, barely visible even in direct light. Their hands move in constant, fluid patterns  -  practicing strikes against targets only they can see.
DIALOGUE: The shadow is not where you hide. It is where you strike from.

NAME: Whisper
DESC: You almost didn't see them. A figure in the darkest corner, wrapped in cloth so black it seems to absorb light. Only their eyes are visible  -  and they're watching you.
DIALOGUE: You saw me. That means I let you. Remember that.

NAME: Training Dummy
DESC: A reinforced practice target. It doesn't fight back.

NAME: Sparring Partner
DESC: A skilled fighter who pulls their punches. Barely.

NAME: Gravity Construct
DESC: A training golem that gets heavier the longer you fight it.

NAME: Mirror Self
DESC: An exact copy of you. It knows every move you'll make.

NAME: Wooden Striking Post
DESC: A simple wooden post with target rings painted on it.

NAME: Speed Bag Golem
DESC: A small fast-moving construct that tests reflexes.

NAME: Iron Sparring Golem
DESC: A heavy metal construct that hits hard and takes punishment.

NAME: Elemental Training Orb
DESC: A floating orb that cycles through fire ice and lightning attacks.

NAME: Shadow Clone
DESC: A dark copy of you that fights with your weaknesses exposed.

NAME: Endurance Pillar
DESC: A construct that never attacks but gets harder to damage over time.

NAME: Training Master
DESC: A weathered instructor who evaluates your form and technique.
DIALOGUE: Your stance is sloppy. Widen your feet.

NAME: Meditation Guide
DESC: A serene figure in white robes who teaches focus techniques.
DIALOGUE: Breathe. Center yourself.

NAME: Blade Monk Takeshi
DESC: A weathered monk in simple robes, his hands calloused from decades of sword practice. He moves with an economy of motion that suggests absolute mastery.
DIALOGUE: The sword is not a weapon. It is an extension of will.

NAME: Grandmaster Yun
DESC: An impossibly old figure seated in perfect stillness. Their hands rest on their knees, each knuckle a weapon unto itself. The air around them feels denser.
DIALOGUE: The fist is the first weapon. The last weapon. The only weapon you will never lose.

NAME: Archery Master Hana
DESC: A serene figure with a longbow taller than themselves. They stand motionless, arrow nocked, watching something invisible in the distance with absolute patience.
DIALOGUE: Release before you think. The arrow knows where it must go.

NAME: Lost Soul
DESC: A confused spirit wandering the afterlife paths.

NAME: Spirit Guardian
DESC: A warrior who chose to guard the paths between life and death.

NAME: Oni Gatekeeper
DESC: A massive horned demon that guards a checkpoint.

NAME: Reaper Initiate
DESC: A young death god still learning the trade.

NAME: The Forgotten King
DESC: A spirit so old even death has forgotten his name.

NAME: Soul Moth
DESC: A tiny luminous insect that feeds on spiritual energy.

NAME: Wandering Shade
DESC: A formless shadow drifting without purpose or memory.

NAME: Hungry Ghost
DESC: A spirit consumed by a single desire it can never fulfill.

NAME: Spirit Fox
DESC: A ghostly fox with multiple tails. Mischievous but dangerous.

NAME: Ancestral Warrior
DESC: The spirit of a great fighter who trains eternally in death.

NAME: Demon Foot Soldier
DESC: A minor demon with red skin and a barbed spear.

NAME: Celestial Soldier
DESC: An armored spirit serving the judges of the dead.

NAME: Soul Eater
DESC: A bloated spirit that consumes other ghosts to grow stronger.

NAME: Infernal Hound
DESC: A three-headed dog made of black fire that guards the deeper paths.

NAME: Wrathful Ancestor
DESC: A spirit twisted by rage who attacks the living on sight.

NAME: Bone Serpent
DESC: A massive snake made of interlocking bones that slithers through the spirit realm.

NAME: Judge's Scribe
DESC: A spectral bureaucrat who records the deeds of the dead.
DIALOGUE: Your name is not yet in my ledger.

NAME: Afterlife Ferryman
DESC: A hooded figure with a long pole who transports souls across the river.
DIALOGUE: The crossing costs a memory. Choose wisely.

NAME: Spirit Healer
DESC: A gentle ghost who mends the wounds of the recently deceased.
DIALOGUE: You are not dead yet. Interesting.

NAME: Holo-Sensei
DESC: A flickering holographic figure in samurai armor, projected from a device bolted to the counter. Despite being intangible, the blade it holds leaves scorch marks on the air.
DIALOGUE: Energy follows intent. The beam blade is thought made manifest.

NAME: The Archmage (Holographic)
DESC: A robed figure rendered in blue light, their staff crackling with simulated arcane energy. The hologram is so detailed you can see individual runes shifting on their skin.
DIALOGUE: The staff channels. Focus flows through it like water through a riverbed. Let it carry you.

NAME: Reception AI
DESC: A holographic woman behind a desk, her smile frozen in corporate perfection.

NAME: Noodle Chef Tanaka
DESC: A sweating man working three woks simultaneously, flames leaping with each toss.

NAME: Chrome Dealer Vex
DESC: A woman with more metal than skin, her eyes cycling through colors as she scans you.

NAME: Street Prophet
DESC: A man covered in glowing tattoos, standing at the crossroads muttering prophecies.

NAME: Junkyard Boss Krill
DESC: A massive man made mostly of salvaged parts, sitting on a throne of scrap metal.

NAME: The Broker
DESC: A figure in a hooded coat, face hidden behind a featureless mask. Their voice is synthesized.

NAME: Doc Patches
DESC: A woman in a bloodstained lab coat, her cybernetic hands twitching with precision.

NAME: Mama Chen
DESC: An old woman selling synthetic vegetables from a rickety stall. Her eyes are sharp despite her age.

NAME: Maestro Beaumont
DESC: A silver-haired gentleman in an immaculate white suit, a rapier resting against his chair. His posture is perfect, his smile dangerous.
DIALOGUE: Every parry is an invitation. Every riposte, an acceptance.

NAME: Building Super
DESC: A grumpy man in overalls, jangling a ring of keys.

NAME: Detective Morrison
DESC: A tired man in a rumpled suit, cigarette smoke curling around his fedora. Files cover every surface.

NAME: Old Man Wei
DESC: An ancient man sitting behind a counter of dried herbs and strange artifacts.

NAME: Monk Liang
DESC: A bald man in saffron robes, sitting in perfect stillness before a smoking incense burner.

NAME: Dockmaster Hank
DESC: A weathered man with a clipboard, shouting orders at longshoremen.

NAME: Fishmonger Pete
DESC: A man in a stained apron, gutting fish with mechanical efficiency.

NAME: Siege Engineer Volkov
DESC: A massive figure in blast-scarred armor, idly spinning a war hammer that would take two normal people to lift. Craters in the floor mark where they practice.
DIALOGUE: Armor is a suggestion. With enough force, everything breaks.

NAME: Sniper Instructor Reyes
DESC: A lean figure in a ghillie suit, cleaning a rifle with methodical precision. Their eyes never stop scanning, even in conversation. A collection of spent casings forms a neat pyramid nearby.
DIALOGUE: One round. One target. Patience is the deadliest weapon in any arsenal.

NAME: Quartermaster Hayes
DESC: A no-nonsense woman behind a cage of weapons and supplies.

NAME: Sergeant Major Cole
DESC: A scarred man sitting on a bunk, cleaning his rifle with practiced hands.

NAME: Cook Ramirez
DESC: A heavyset man stirring a massive pot of something that might be stew.

NAME: Refugee Elder Miriam
DESC: An old woman wrapped in blankets, eyes hollow but determined.

NAME: Field Medic Torres
DESC: A young woman with blood on her hands, working frantically on a wounded soldier.

NAME: Arms Dealer Vasquez
DESC: A man in a leather jacket, surrounded by crates of weapons from a dozen different armies.

NAME: The Librarian
DESC: A being of pure light, hovering between shelves of crystallized knowledge.

NAME: Shard Merchant Opal
DESC: A crystalline humanoid whose body refracts light into rainbows. Their voice chimes like glass.

NAME: Forge Spirit
DESC: A being of molten metal and flame, hammering at an anvil that floats in empty space.

NAME: Terracotta General
DESC: A figure of fired clay given impossible life. It stands at attention with a halberd, its movements precise and mechanical yet devastatingly effective.
DIALOGUE: Reach is control. Control is victory. The polearm commands the battlefield.

NAME: Paradox Smith
DESC: A figure that seems to exist in multiple moments simultaneously. Their weapon shifts form between heartbeats  -  blade, whip, chain, something that has no name.
DIALOGUE: Predictability is death. Chaos is life. Let the weapon decide what it wants to be.

NAME: Roman Announcer
DESC: A man in a toga, his voice trained to carry across the colosseum.

NAME: Egyptian Merchant Khufu
DESC: A man in white linen, his stall covered in golden trinkets and papyrus scrolls.

NAME: High Priest Amenhotep
DESC: A tall man with a golden headdress, his eyes lined with kohl. Power radiates from him.

NAME: Viking Shipwright Bjorn
DESC: A massive man with a braided beard, carving a dragon prow from a single log.

NAME: Skald Ingrid
DESC: A woman with wild red hair, singing tales of battle over a horn of mead.

NAME: Viking Smith Thorvald
DESC: A soot-covered man hammering a blade on a rune-carved anvil.

NAME: Aztec Trader Itzel
DESC: A woman in feathered garments, her stall displaying obsidian blades and jade ornaments.

NAME: Sheriff Hawkins
DESC: A lean man with a star pinned to his vest, a revolver on each hip.

NAME: Stablehand Eli
DESC: A young man mucking out stalls, whistling tunelessly.

NAME: Atlantean Merchant Nereus
DESC: A being with iridescent scales and webbed fingers, displaying wares on a coral counter.

NAME: Atlantean Herald
DESC: A tall figure in flowing robes of living water, their voice echoing with authority.

NAME: Atlantean Archivist
DESC: A hunched figure surrounded by floating tablets of compressed water, each containing text.

NAME: Golden Guardian
DESC: A statue of pure gold that moves with fluid grace. Its eyes burn with ancient fire.

NAME: Undercity Fence
DESC: A hunched figure in the shadows, eyes gleaming with avarice.

NAME: Gravity Chamber Technician
DESC: A wiry technician in a lab coat, surrounded by floating equipment modules.
DIALOGUE: Need supplies for your training? I've got the good stuff.

NAME: Void Adept Kira
DESC: A figure floating cross-legged above the ground, surrounded by a faint distortion in space. Their eyes are closed, but you sense they are acutely aware of everything.
DIALOGUE: Between atoms, there is void. Learn to strike there, and nothing can resist you.

NAME: Gravity Core Sentinel
DESC: A towering construct of folded spacetime, its body rippling with gravitational distortions. The air around it bends light into prismatic halos.
DIALOGUE: The Sentinel compresses space around its fist...

NAME: Archivist Unit 7
DESC: A floating mechanical sphere covered in lenses and data ports. It hums with stored information.

NAME: Spectral Vendor
DESC: A translucent figure that flickers between planes, its wares hovering in mid-air.
DIALOGUE: Even the dead need supplies... browse freely, traveler.

NAME: The Hollow King
DESC: A skeletal monarch wreathed in pale fire, seated on a throne of petrified screams. Its crown pulses with the memories of a thousand forgotten worlds.
DIALOGUE: The Hollow King raises his scepter, drawing power from the void...

NAME: Gatekeeper Anubis
DESC: A towering figure with the head of a jackal, holding golden scales in one hand.

NAME: Spirit of Valor
DESC: A luminous warrior in ancient armor, their form flickering between a dozen different faces.

NAME: Judge of Souls
DESC: A robed figure whose face is hidden behind a featureless golden mask. They radiate absolute authority.
